description_long: This is a tall, rectangular wooden wardrobe with a natural wood grain finish and a flat top surface. The front features two large, vertically-oriented doors, each with a dark central panel that may be glass or a contrasting material, and small round knobs for handles. The sides display a consistent wood texture, while the back is a plain, light-colored panel, likely made of a different material for structural support. The wardrobe stands on a flat base, with no visible legs or feet. The overall design is simple and functional, with a classic, paneled door style. The wardrobe is likely hollow inside, intended for storing clothes or other items.
description: A tall, rectangular wooden wardrobe with two paneled doors featuring dark central panels and round knobs, finished in a natural wood grain.
description_view_0: Front view showing two paneled doors with dark central panels and round knobs.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the wood grain texture and the depth of the wardrobe.
description_view_2: Back view with a plain, light-colored panel, lacking decorative features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the wood grain texture seen in view 1.
